name: Baked Cod
recipeInstructions:
1. Place cod in a baking dish (preferably thawed).
2. Sprinkle seasoned salt lightly over the fish.
3. Squeeze the juice of the lemon and sprinkle it over the fish.
4. Cut the butter into small pieces and place them on top of the fish so that each piece has 2 or 3 pieces of butter.
5. Cover the baking dish with foil.
6. Bake in a preheated oven at 350 degrees Fahrenheit for 30 minutes.
7. Remove from the oven and sprinkle parsley over the fish before serving.
